VAL-CDISPATCH-006.evidence: Async allreduce integration validated implicitly through 10-step correctness test with all cosine sims >= 0.999983. C dispatch plan built for 64 layers × 4 engines with allreduce event recording. The C dispatch loop dispatches attention, records compute events, submits allreduce on dedicated stream, records done events, and dispatches FFN — all within the C loop. Correctness at all positions confirms allreduce events fire correctly.
